meta.notes: Coordinates are authored on Spring atlas and expected to map to the same positions on Summer, Autumn and Winter atlases.

integrationRules.seasonHandling: Use the same atlas coordinates for each season; swap only the source atlas image by current season.

water_idle_sparkle_loop_a.notes: Random decorative water animation placed only on full/plain water tiles, never on water borders/corners/transitions.

water_idle_sparkle_loop_b.notes: Second random decorative water animation placed only on full/plain water tiles, never on water borders/corners/transitions.

fountain_loop.notes: Animated fountain object placed on clean grass_light full/plain tiles. Use bottom-footprint collision only if the object should block movement.

terrainVariationPlacement.notes: Terrain variation tiles are decorative replacements/overlays for full/plain terrain cells only. They must never override autotile borders, corners or transition categories.

light_small_rock.notes: Small non-blocking light grass rocks. Spawn sparsely on plain grass_light only.

dark_small_rock.notes: Small non-blocking dark grass rocks. Spawn sparsely on plain grass_dark only.

small_water_rock.notes: Small decorative water rocks. Place only on full/plain water cells; no collision impact.

shroom_green_01.notes: Small shrooms that spawn in small clusters on grass_light near trees.

small_flowers.notes: Small flowers for grass variation. Use medium-low density on full grass tiles only.

variation_around_sand.notes: Grass_light variation that appears around sand zones, not inside sand.

variation_on_sand.notes: Subtle full-sand tile variations. Replace only some full sand tiles, never sand borders.

variation_on_grass_light.notes: Full grass_light variations. Use sparsely so base terrain remains readable.

variation_on_grass_dark.notes: Full grass_dark variations. Use sparsely on dark grass patch interiors.

small_herbs_dark.notes: Small herbs for grass_dark. Low density.

small_herbs_light.notes: Small herbs for grass_light. Low density.

variation_on_road.notes: Subtle full-road tile variations. Replace only some full road tiles, never road borders.

variation_around_road.notes: Grass_light variation that appears around road zones, not inside road.

atlas_trees.notes: Atlas-based world trees placed on clean grass_light tiles with bottom-footprint collision.
